operational_knowledge_units.title: GetAGVStatuses returns current AGV state, command, vitals, and errors
operational_knowledge_units.summary: The GetAGVStatuses API shows the current state of the AGV, its current command, vitals, any AGV errors, and system errors.
observed_evidence: Bullet text: 'GetAGVStatuses: Shows the current State of the AGV, its current command, vitals, any AGV errors and System errors.'
operational_knowledge_units.retrieval_text: API capability for AGVs: GetAGVStatuses shows the current AGV state, current command, vitals, AGV errors, and system errors.

operational_knowledge_units.title: ResendGeekCommand resends a request to Geek+ using a command GUID
operational_knowledge_units.summary: The ResendGeekCommand API requires a command GUID and resends the request to Geek+. The slide notes it is helpful when an unplanned restart occurred and Geek+ missed the original request.
observed_evidence: Bullet text: 'ResendGeekCommand: Requires a command guid. It will resend the request to Geek+. Helpful in the event of an unplanned restart and Geek+ missed the request.'
operational_knowledge_units.retrieval_text: API capability for AGVs: ResendGeekCommand requires a command GUID and resends the request to Geek+. It is described as helpful after an unplanned restart when Geek+ missed the request.

procedure_candidate_attempts.title: Use ResendGeekCommand to resend a missed request to Geek+
preconditions: There is an indication that Geek+ missed a request
Context may include an unplanned restart, as stated on the slide
procedure_candidate_attempts.procedure_visual_summary: Bullet list under AGVs describing ResendGeekCommand, its required command GUID, and its use after an unplanned restart when Geek+ missed the request.

steps.instruction: Obtain the command GUID for the request that needs to be resent.
steps.expected_outcome: A command GUID is available for use with ResendGeekCommand.
steps.validation_check: Confirm the required command GUID is present.

steps.instruction: Use ResendGeekCommand to resend the request to Geek+.
steps.expected_outcome: The request is resent to Geek+.
steps.validation_check: Verify the resend action was issued to Geek+.

warnings: The slide provides API purpose and input requirement, but does not show the exact invocation method or interface.
This candidate is inferred only from the explicit bullet text and requires review before operational use.
procedure_candidate_attempts.retrieval_text: Recovery-oriented API action candidate: ResendGeekCommand requires a command GUID and resends the request to Geek+. The slide says it is helpful after an unplanned restart when Geek+ missed the request.
